warmup: Incline treadmill walk — 8–10 min at 3.3–3.5 mph, 6–8% incline

exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.cue: May 21: got 3×10, last rep on set 3 tough. Push for cleaner reps today — controlled 2-sec eccentric. Alternating with incline from Monday.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.cue: Holding at 35 per shoulder protocol. You got 12 on set 3 Monday — shoulder is trending positive. Try for clean 3×10 today. A bump to 37.5 is coming soon.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.prescription: 150 lb × 10 reps · 3 sets (drop to 135 on set 3 if needed)
exercises.cue: May 21: got 12 clean at 135 lb. Machine jumps to 150 — time to test it. Attempt 150 for sets 1–2. If set 3 is too heavy, drop to 135.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.cue: Elbows high and wide. Pause at peak contraction. Don't rush these — they protect the shoulder.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly (cable)
exercises.cue: May 21: 11 lb dual cable, last rep tough. Hold at 11 lb for clean, full-range reps. Lead with elbows, not hands.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + EZ-Bar Curl
exercises.prescription: Rope pushdown 80 lb × 12 + EZ-Bar curl 45 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.cue: 60–75s between rounds. EZ-bar is fresh stimulus — keep elbows pinned, no swinging. Rope pushdown: full extension at bottom, squeeze.

exercises.name: Core Circuit A
exercises.prescription: Dead Bugs × 8/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Hollow Body Hold 25s · 2 rounds
exercises.cue: Dead bugs: lower back pressed flat the entire time. Hollow body: arms overhead, lower back flat — if hips pop up, reset. 30s side plank is a bump from your usual 25s.

finisher: Incline treadmill walk — 10 min at 3.3–3.5 mph, 6–8% incline. Skip if session hits 65 min.
notes: Big test today: cable row at 150 lb after getting 12 clean at 135 on May 21. Flat bench alternates with incline from Monday's session. EZ-bar curl is a fresh bicep stimulus — haven't done it in several sessions.
